title: Facebook Profile Posts & All Photos Scraper
description: Scrape posts exposed on public Facebook personal profiles without supplying Facebook cookies or login credentials. Each result contains post text, Facebook publish time, author, stable identifiers, engagement when available, and all recoverable photo URLs. Private, friends-only, and login-only content is not accessed.

profileUrls.title: Public Facebook profile URLs
profileUrls.description: Public personal profile URLs, handles, numeric profile IDs, profile.php URLs, or people/... URLs. Groups, Marketplace listings, and direct post URLs are not profile targets.

maxProfilesPerRun.title: Max profiles per run
maxProfilesPerRun.description: Maximum number of profile targets processed independently in one run.

maxPostsPerProfile.title: Max posts per profile
maxPostsPerProfile.description: Maximum public post results returned for each profile. A smaller number is recommended for first tests and daily monitoring.

expandAllPhotos.title: Expand all photos
expandAllPhotos.description: Recover photo URLs hidden behind Facebook +N album grids when publicly available.

omitPinnedPosts.title: Omit pinned posts
omitPinnedPosts.description: Exclude a pinned older post from the profile header feed so newest-first monitoring stays predictable.

sinceDate.title: Since date
sinceDate.description: Optional monitoring boundary. Stop after the feed reaches posts older than this date.

knownPostIds.title: Known post IDs
knownPostIds.description: Post IDs already stored by your pipeline. The Actor starts from the newest posts and stops when one is reached.

startCursor.title: Start cursor
startCursor.description: Cursor from SUMMARY.pointer.nextCursor for a one-profile older-post backfill. Do not use yesterday's cursor to look for newer posts or reuse one profile's cursor for another profile.

includeRawPayload.title: Include raw payload
includeRawPayload.description: Include the parsed Facebook post payload in each result. Useful for debugging and much larger than normal output.

bootstrapRetries.title: Bootstrap retries
bootstrapRetries.description: Fresh proxy/session attempts for profile resolution and bootstrap failures.

graphqlPageRetries.title: GraphQL page retries
graphqlPageRetries.description: Retries for transient empty, rate-limited, or failed timeline pages.

proxyCountry.title: Proxy country
proxyCountry.description: Two-letter country code for Apify residential proxy sessions.

mediaExpansionConcurrency.title: Photo expansion concurrency
mediaExpansionConcurrency.description: Number of posts whose public photo sets can be expanded in parallel.

mediaSetRetries.title: Photo-set retries
mediaSetRetries.description: Retry count for each Facebook media/set or permalink expansion request.

debug.title: Debug output
debug.description: Add discovery and response diagnostics to SUMMARY.
